ttl.dbg.connect: Connection settings, translated to Tera Term command-line options. Omit to let the macro connect itself.
ttl.dbg.connect.host: Host name or address (ssh / telnet), or named pipe path (namedpipe).
ttl.dbg.connect.port: TCP port number (ssh / telnet). Sent as host:port. (/P=)
ttl.dbg.connect.speed: Speed (baud rate) of the serial port (console). (/BAUD=)
ttl.dbg.connect.cdatabit: Data bits of the serial port: 7 or 8 (console). (/CDATABIT=)
ttl.dbg.connect.cstopbit: Stop bits of the serial port: 1, 1.5 or 2 (console). (/CSTOPBIT=)
ttl.dbg.connect.cflowctrl: Flow control of the serial port (console). (/CFLOWCTRL=)
ttl.dbg.connect.cdelayperchar: Transmission delay per character of the serial port, in ms (console). (/CDELAYPERCHAR=)
ttl.dbg.connect.cdelayperline: Transmission delay per line of the serial port, in ms (console). (/CDELAYPERLINE=)
ttl.dbg.connect.waitcom: When the serial port does not exist, wait for the connection (console). (/WAITCOM)
ttl.dbg.connect.options: Extra raw Tera Term options appended as-is, e.g. ["/auth=password", "/user=admin"].
ttl.dbg.logFile: Start Tera Term with logging to this file. (/L=)
ttl.dbg.hidden: Start Tera Term in hidden (invisible) state. (/V)
ttl.dbg.multicastName: Multicast name for the sendmulticast macro command. (/MN=)
ttl.dbg.osc52: Operations to permit for clipboard access from the remote host. (/OSC52=)
ttl.dbg.autoWinClose: Automatically close the window on disconnection. (/AUTOWINCLOSE=on|off)
ttl.dbg.disableLocalEcho: Disable the TCPLocalEcho and TCPCRSend options. (/E)
ttl.dbg.newConnectionDialog: Show (true, /ES) or hide (false, /DS) the 'New connection' dialog on startup. Note: usually suppressed when a macro is given.
ttl.dbg.teraTermDir: Directory containing ttermpro.exe. Auto-detected (e.g. C:\Program Files\teraterm5) when empty.
